title: Official public GitHub repo appears
summary: happyhorseai/happyhorse is created as a public repository.
impact: Creates a direct public reference point for the product.

title: Official repo launches with marketing README
summary: The initial public GitHub presence is a product-positioning README.
impact: Signals branding-first GitHub usage rather than code release.

title: Personal information collection repo appears
summary: brooks376/Happy-Horse-1.0 publishes a long-form public intelligence page.

title: Awesome-style resource repo appears
summary: ZeroLu/awesome-happy-horse frames Happy Horse as a curated prompt and benchmark topic.
impact: Adds reusable prompt and sample-library framing.

title: Source-hierarchy repo appears
summary: robert-2-j/HappyHorse-1.0 emphasizes evidence hierarchy and timeline reconstruction.
impact: Raises the public standard for fact-vs-rumor framing.

title: Signal-tracking repo appears
summary: EvoLinkAI/happyhorse-1.0 packages the topic as a source-map and monitoring project.
impact: Pushes the conversation toward rapid public-intel updates.
